component.name: COSMIC Cloud Mounter
component.summary: Manage online storage mounts and offline storage mirrors

description.p: Manage supported cloud and network storage from the COSMIC panel using online mounts or bidirectionally synchronized offline mirrors.
COSMIC Cloud Mounter helps keep file-manager workflows responsive when cloud storage, VPN, or network connectivity is intermittent.

ul.li: Online mounts and offline mirrors for OneDrive, Google Drive, Box, and SMB.
Applet-managed systemd user services and timers.
Optional NetworkManager and Cisco Secure Client readiness checks.
Dependency checks without storing provider or VPN credentials.

screenshot.caption: Manage storage connections from the COSMIC panel popup.
Add a storage connection with provider, mode, remote, local target, and VPN options.
Modify, test, disable, remove, preview, or synchronize an existing connection.

ul.li: Refined README installation, removal, and Flatpak publication guidance.
Updated screenshots for public repository review.
Recorded local Flatpak AppStream visibility and uninstall behavior validation.
Aligned Cargo, Debian, AppStream, README, and Flatpak manifest release metadata.
Updated AppStream screenshots to stable tag-based URLs for publication.
Kept the 0.4.0 Flatpak host-runner, shared configuration, VPN, OneDrive, SMB, and UI improvements.
Added Flatpak host-runner packaging groundwork and shared native-visible configuration paths.
Improved VPN status, Cisco activation, OneDrive mirror setup, SMB remote authentication, and removal confirmation flows.
Refined popup layout, settings UI behavior, COSMIC metadata, and Debian package validation handling.
Added a desktop-portal folder picker for local mountpoints and mirror directories.
Preserved manual path entry and existing local target safety validation.
Refined the compact COSMIC panel popup and Add/Modify connection workflows.
Added applet-driven rclone remote detection, creation, selection, and confirmed unused-remote removal.
Added OneDrive online mount and offline mirror setup improvements.
Added AppStream metadata and Debian package build support.
